page_desc: The ultimate professional temporary email service. Protect your privacy and keep your primary inbox spam-free with disposable, secure, and fast anonymous email addresses. Perfect for social media registration, testing, and avoiding trackers. No registration required – get your temp mail instantly.
no_new_msg: You have no new messages at the moment.
duplicate_email_error: Address already exists in library! Try different Custom Email Prefix.
delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this inbox?
privacy_content:
• We do not store messages permanently; they are automatically deleted after a short period.
  • We do not ask for any personal data or identities to create an email.
  • The service is designed to protect your privacy from spam.
  • By using the site, you agree to the automatic deletion of data every 24 hours.
faq_content:
How long does the email last?

It remains active as long as the browser is open, and the library is cleared every 24 hours to ensure privacy.

Can I recover a deleted email?

No, once automatically or manually deleted, data cannot be recovered permanently.

Is the service free?

Yes, the service is completely free and supported by simple ads to ensure continued operation.

Why am I not receiving some messages?

Make sure to refresh the inbox. Some sites may block temporary domains; try changing the domain from the list.

How do I protect my official accounts?

Use our temporary email to register on untrusted sites to protect your primary email from hacking and spam.
